diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Diagram
diagrams.description: Shows relationship between total facility energy and IT equipment energy with visual representation of energy overhead
elements: Total Facility Energy (includes IT + Cooling + Lighting + Losses)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how PUE is calculated and what it represents

diagrams.title: Virtualization Architecture
diagrams.description: Depicts how hypervisor creates multiple VMs on single physical server
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how virtualization maximizes hardware utilization

diagrams.title: Container vs VM Architecture
diagrams.description: Comparison showing differences between containers and virtual machines
diagrams.purpose: Understanding lightweight nature of containers compared to VMs

diagrams.title: Edge Computing Architecture
diagrams.description: Shows distributed computing model with processing at network edge
diagrams.purpose: Understanding how edge computing reduces data transmission energy

diagrams.title: Green Cloud Framework Components
diagrams.description: Illustrates integrated approach for sustainable cloud computing
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing comprehensive nature of green cloud framework
